hooks.command: test "$DYNAMO_DEV_BYPASS" = 1 && echo '{}' && exit 0; bun run bin/dynamo.cjs hook SessionStart
test "$DYNAMO_DEV_BYPASS" = 1 && echo '{}' && exit 0; bun run bin/dynamo.cjs hook UserPromptSubmit
test "$DYNAMO_DEV_BYPASS" = 1 && echo '{}' && exit 0; bun run bin/dynamo.cjs hook PreToolUse
test "$DYNAMO_DEV_BYPASS" = 1 && echo '{}' && exit 0; bun run bin/dynamo.cjs hook PostToolUse
test "$DYNAMO_DEV_BYPASS" = 1 && echo '{}' && exit 0; bun run bin/dynamo.cjs hook Stop
test "$DYNAMO_DEV_BYPASS" = 1 && echo '{}' && exit 0; bun run bin/dynamo.cjs hook PreCompact
test "$DYNAMO_DEV_BYPASS" = 1 && echo '{}' && exit 0; bun run bin/dynamo.cjs hook SubagentStart
test "$DYNAMO_DEV_BYPASS" = 1 && echo '{}' && exit 0; bun run bin/dynamo.cjs hook SubagentStop
